failedAssertions.reason: Error UI not displayed when API is unreachable - hasErrorUI() returns false. Other network error scenarios (session list API fails, network error during login) pass.
failedTests: Shows error UI when API is unreachable

failedAssertions.reason: Error UI not displayed for 500 errors on session create, profile load, and chat API. 500 during data export passes. Root cause: hasErrorUI() check returns false in these specific scenarios.
failedTests: Shows error UI when server returns 500 on session create
Shows error UI when server returns 500 on profile load
Shows error UI when chat API returns 500

failedAssertions.reason: Timeout error UI not displayed for specific timeout scenario. Session API timeout and settings API timeout pass. Root cause: hasErrorUI() check returns false.
failedTests: Shows timeout error when request times out

systemicIssues.description: hasErrorUI() function returns false in certain error scenarios, causing error handling tests to fail
systemicIssues.impact: VAL-ERROR-001, VAL-ERROR-002, VAL-ERROR-003 - 5 specific test scenarios fail
systemicIssues.rootCause: The hasErrorUI() helper function used by error-handling tests does not detect error UI in these specific scenarios. The error UI may exist but not be detected by the helper, or the error UI is truly not being shown.
